message:
fix(core,search,server): fix doctor project identity matching and salvage placeholder reconciliation

Improve DoctorProjectIdentity fuzzy matching to handle slug-only archive
projects against DB entries with full paths by normalizing tokens from
basename. Fix enrich_existing_project_from_salvage to also upgrade
placeholder slugs (not just human_key). Add
reconcile_placeholder_project_duplicates_after_salvage to merge
canonical salvage rows into archive placeholder rows post-salvage,
preserving the archive project id. Also fix argument order in
doctor_archive_project_identity (slug first). Add integration tests
covering slug-only identity matching and placeholder promotion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
